description: Address semantic review issues: temporal reversal bug, sys.path cleanup, fallback mixer upgrade, adjacency cost comment.
steps: Fix temporal reversal bug in gem_block.py by adding z_temporal.flip(1) after mamba call on the (B*C, T, D) tensor
Replace SimpleMambaFallback in mixer_seq_simple.py with a causal Conv1d-based mixer (Conv1d kernel_size=4 + GELU + Linear)
Remove sys.path.insert(0, '.') from gem_block.py, graph_construction.py, and mbg.py; use relative imports; keep sys.path only inside __main__ block in mbg.py
Add comment about adjacency computation cost in graph_construction.py
Verify all changes pass the forward pass test
acceptance_criteria: No sys.path.insert at module level in any models/ or modules/ file
Fallback mixer uses Conv1d with temporal receptive field instead of pointwise MLP
